title: The Couple at Table Seven
content: Every Friday evening, Mia noticed the same elderly couple sitting at table seven in the restaurant where she worked. They always ordered the same meal, shared dessert, and spent hours talking quietly. Curious, Mia finally asked how long they had been married. The man smiled and answered, 'Fifty-two years.' His wife laughed and explained that they still treated every Friday like their first date. Watching them changed the way Mia thought about love. She realized that lasting relationships were not built with grand surprises every day but with simple moments repeated with kindness, patience, and genuine attention.
